title: BEM-583 decision live status
objective:
Run script:
"""
NL='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_path=Path('governance/state/operator_decision_dispatcher_state.json')
dispatch_report=Path('governance/reports/operator_decision_dispatch_result.md')
queue_file=Path('governance/operator_decision_queue/bem582_decision_format_live_test.json')
script_pick=Path('scripts/operator_decision_pick.py')
script_record=Path('scripts/operator_decision_record_dispatch.py')
workflow=Path('.github/workflows/operator-decision-dispatcher.yml')
state={}
if state_path.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(state_path.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={'parse_error': True, 'raw': state_path.read_text(errors='ignore')[:1000]}
last=state.get('last_run') if isinstance(state,dict) else None
status='unknown'
blocker=None
if isinstance(last,dict):
    status=last.get('telegram_status') or 'unknown'
    blocker=last.get('blocker')
if not state_path.exists():
    blocker={'code':'OPERATOR_DECISION_DISPATCH_STATE_MISSING','message':'operator_decision_dispatcher_state.json not found yet; workflow may not have completed or failed before record step.'}
    status='state_missing'
report_lines=[
'# BEM-583 | Operator Decision Live Status',
'',
'Dата: 2026-05-17 | 22:06 (UTC+3)',
'',
'## Inputs',
'- Queue file exists: '+str(queue_file.exists()),
'- Workflow exists: '+str(workflow.exists()),
'- Picker exists: '+str(script_pick.exists()),
'- Recorder exists: '+str(script_record.exists()),
'- Dispatch state exists: '+str(state_path.exists()),
'- Dispatch report exists: '+str(dispatch_report.exists()),
'',
'## Last run',
json.dumps(last, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) if isinstance(last,dict) else str(last),
'',
'## Status',
str(status),
'',
'## Blocker',
'null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
]
report=reports/'bem583_operator_decision_live_status.md'
report.write_text(NL.join(report_lines)+NL)
record={'record_type':'bem583_operator_decision_live_status','cycle_id':'bem583-operator-decision-live-status','source':'gpt','status':status,'queue_file':str(queue_file),'dispatch_state_exists':state_path.exists(),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:06 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle:
    handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+NL)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem583_operator_decision_live_status']={'status':status,'queue_file_exists':queue_file.exists(),'dispatch_state_exists':state_path.exists(),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 22:06 (UTC+3)'
contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+NL)
proof=proofs/'bem583_operator_decision_live_status.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-583: operator decision live status inspected. status='+str(status)+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Inspected operator decision dispatcher live status and recorded blocker/status')
"""
No issue comments.
